tasks.subject: Task 1: Audit Origin extensions (event_rule + vision_tool)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add Origin.EVENT_RULE and Origin.VISION_TOOL constants and include in Origin.ALL.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/observability/audit.py
- Test: tests/observability/test_audit_origins.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Origin.EVENT_RULE == 'event_rule'
- Origin.VISION_TOOL == 'vision_tool'
- Both in Origin.ALL
- AuditEvent round-trips without UNKNOWN normalization

**Verify:** pytest tests/observability/test_audit_origins.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/observability/audit.py", "tests/observability/test_audit_origins.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/observability/test_audit_origins.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["event_rule constant + ALL", "vision_tool constant + ALL", "round-trips JSON"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: HAWebSocketHub — extract shared singleton
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pull HA WS connection out of ha_sensor_watcher into multi-consumer hub. Both ha_sensor_watcher and EventRouter become consumers.

**Files:**
- Create: glados/ha_ws/__init__.py, glados/ha_ws/hub.py
- Modify: glados/autonomy/agents/ha_sensor_watcher.py, glados/core/engine.py
- Test: tests/ha_ws/test_hub.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- One WS connection, fan-out dispatch to all consumers
- subscribe/unsubscribe by token
- Consumer exception doesn't break others
- Exponential-backoff reconnect preserved
- ha_sensor_watcher still passes its tests with hub injected

**Verify:** pytest tests/ha_ws/test_hub.py tests/autonomy/test_ha_sensor_watcher.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/ha_ws/__init__.py", "glados/ha_ws/hub.py", "glados/autonomy/agents/ha_sensor_watcher.py", "glados/core/engine.py", "tests/ha_ws/__init__.py", "tests/ha_ws/test_hub.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/ha_ws/test_hub.py tests/autonomy/ -k sensor -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["subscribe returns token", "dispatch reaches all consumers", "exception isolated", "reconnect backoff", "sensor_watcher still works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: events.yaml schema + loader
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pydantic models for events.yaml + loader with line-pinpointed validation errors.

**Files:**
- Create: glados/events/__init__.py, glados/events/config.py, configs/events.yaml (starter, all disabled)
- Test: tests/events/test_config.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- EventRule fields per spec
- action_kind in {audio_random, llm, vision_cascade}
- vision_cascade requires vlm_camera
- cooldown_s default 30, min_clear_s default 10
- Missing file → empty config (not error)
- Duplicate IDs rejected

**Verify:** pytest tests/events/test_config.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/events/__init__.py", "glados/events/config.py", "configs/events.yaml", "tests/events/__init__.py", "tests/events/test_config.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/events/test_config.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["missing file → empty", "audio_random parses", "vision_cascade requires camera", "invalid action_kind rejected", "duplicate ids rejected"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: EventRouter — match + dispatch + debounce
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Class consuming hub events, matching against rules, applying cooldown / min_clear / per-camera lockout, dispatching to action handlers.

**Files:**
- Create: glados/events/router.py
- Test: tests/events/test_router.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Matching event dispatches
- Disabled rule does not dispatch
- to_state mismatch does not dispatch
- cooldown_s blocks second fire
- min_clear_s blocks oscillation flap
- per-camera lockout drops second event during in-flight
- audit() logged with Origin.EVENT_RULE

**Verify:** pytest tests/events/test_router.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/events/router.py", "tests/events/test_router.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/events/test_router.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["matching dispatches", "disabled skipped", "cooldown enforced", "min_clear flap rejected", "per-camera lockout", "audit on fire"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: audio_random action — pre-recorded clip play
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Random pick from ${GLADOS_AUDIO}/<category>/<emotion>/, play via HA media_player.play_media. Returns clip stem.

**Files:**
- Create: glados/events/actions/__init__.py, glados/events/actions/audio_random.py
- Test: tests/events/test_action_audio_random.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Picks from ${GLADOS_AUDIO}/<cat>/<emo>/ uniformly
- Falls back to neutral/ if emotion empty
- Missing category → AudioRandomError
- Empty fallback → AudioRandomError 'no stall clips'
- POST to HA media_player.play_media reuses _play_maintenance_wav pattern

**Verify:** pytest tests/events/test_action_audio_random.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/events/actions/__init__.py", "glados/events/actions/audio_random.py", "tests/events/test_action_audio_random.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/events/test_action_audio_random.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["picks + posts to HA", "fallback to neutral", "missing category raises", "empty raises"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: llm action — text-only LLM round
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Single LLM round at operator-configured slot; result enqueues to TTS.

**Files:**
- Create: glados/events/actions/llm.py
- Test: tests/events/test_action_llm.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Result enqueues to tts_queue
- LLM null/empty → no enqueue, WARNING log

**Verify:** pytest tests/events/test_action_llm.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/events/actions/llm.py", "tests/events/test_action_llm.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/events/test_action_llm.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["happy path enqueues", "empty response no enqueue"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: vision_cascade action
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Stall (audio_random) + parallel snapshot+VLM + persona LLM continuation with stall-aware prompt; releases per-camera lockout when done.

**Files:**
- Create: glados/events/actions/vision_cascade.py
- Test: tests/events/test_action_vision_cascade.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Stall fires within ~10ms
- Snapshot + VLM run in parallel
- LLM continuation uses {stall_text} + {vlm_output} substitution
- Snapshot/VLM failure → continuation receives apology context
- All paths release lockout via release_camera()

**Verify:** pytest tests/events/test_action_vision_cascade.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/events/actions/vision_cascade.py", "tests/events/test_action_vision_cascade.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/events/test_action_vision_cascade.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["happy: stall + continuation", "snapshot fail → apology", "all paths release lockout"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: WebUI Integrations → Events tab (admin-only)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Admin-only tab listing rules; CRUD + test-fire.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/webui/tts_ui.py, glados/webui/static/ui.js, glados/webui/static/ui.css
- Test: tests/webui/test_integrations_events_api.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- GET /api/integrations/events returns rules (admin-only)
- POST creates; PUT updates; DELETE removes
- /test_fire posts synthetic state_changed to router
- 400 on validation errors
- 403 on non-admin
- update_config hot-swaps router rules

**Verify:** pytest tests/webui/test_integrations_events_api.py -v + hand-test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/webui/tts_ui.py", "glados/webui/static/ui.js", "glados/webui/static/ui.css", "tests/webui/test_integrations_events_api.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/webui/test_integrations_events_api.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GET admin only", "non-admin 403", "POST creates", "validation 400", "test_fire dispatches"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: WebUI Stall Clips tab (admin-only)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Admin-only upload/list/delete clips at ${GLADOS_AUDIO}/<cat>/<emo>/.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/webui/tts_ui.py, glados/webui/static/ui.js, glados/webui/static/ui.css
- Test: tests/webui/test_integrations_stall_clips_api.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- GET lists clips
- POST uploads MP3/WAV
- DELETE removes
- 403 non-admin; 400 on path-traversal; 413 on >10MB
- Path validation rejects ../, abs paths
- UI: drop-target + preview + delete

**Verify:** pytest tests/webui/test_integrations_stall_clips_api.py -v + hand-test

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/webui/tts_ui.py", "glados/webui/static/ui.js", "glados/webui/static/ui.css", "tests/webui/test_integrations_stall_clips_api.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/webui/test_integrations_stall_clips_api.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["list/upload/delete admin-gated", "path traversal blocked", "10MB cap", "UI uploader works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Engine wiring + health slots + deploy + smoke
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Construct EventRouter at startup; bind hub consumer; expose Event Router + Vision Endpoint health slots. Deploy + smoke.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/core/engine.py, glados/autonomy/<slot-store>, docs/CHANGES.md

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Startup logs: HAWebSocketHub started + authenticated + subscribed; EventRouter loaded N rules
- /health 200 after deploy
- Live: trigger entity → stall plays in ~500ms; LLM continuation in ~3-5s
- Audit log line: kind=tool_call origin=event_rule rule_id=<id>
- Both health slots visible in WebUI System health panel; importance=0 when healthy

**Verify:** Operator-witnessed.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/core/engine.py", "docs/CHANGES.md"], "verifyCommand": "manual live-probe with HA event", "acceptanceCriteria": ["startup logs correct", "health 200", "stall + continuation timing", "audit log row", "slots in WebUI panel"]}
```
